response:
Emily started with 25 dogs and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 before any adoptions occurred. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the center, so she now has 24 dogs remaining at [rescue_center_name] located at [street_address]. The current count is confirmed as [total_dogs] after these events, and the records are stored in [database_file] for [contact_person] to review at [office_hours].

***

The final number of dogs is 24, which is calculated by taking the initial 25, adding the 5 new arrivals, and subtracting the 6 adopted dogs. This update was logged on [date_today] by [staff_member] who noted the location as [facility_room] in the [log_book]. All details regarding the new puppies and the stray are available at [website_url] for potential adopters to see.
